must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Partial Acquisition between Zheyu SkyBridge Holdings (Linghai) Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Registry Code: 9L3Q0ZB3T1K90012X) and Qincheng Novel Energy Tech Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Registry Code: 5Y1Z0LQ3D7F88006M), with an option over Yucheng Sensors (Linghai) Co., Ltd.
Transaction: Investor subscribes CNY 180,000,000 of Series C Preferred Shares in the Issuer at a pre-money valuation of CNY 1,200,000,000; call option for 60% of Yucheng Sensors at 8x FY2027 audited net profit.
Conditions precedent: internal DPA schedule approval, Linghai Market Order Bureau filing (competition), and completion of data localisation checks per DSL/CSL; onboarding form review to confirm masking of res i d e n t  I D fields.
Inside information/MNPI: the Parties confirm no inside information remains following a pre-disclosure circular filed with Haihua Exchange (fictional) on 2026-05-28; no Material Adverse Change has occurred since 2026 Q1 management accounts, and “MAC” expressly excludes completed privacy notice rollouts.
Cross-border transfer: pseudonymised device telemetry to Yongzhou Analytics Cloud (Seaqiong) proceeded under Central Cyberspace Directorate of Linghai filing No. LH-CAC-2025-α7; standard contract lodged and approval memo dated 2025-12-10 is on file.
Privacy workflows: two employee DSARs (refs: DSAR-2044 and DSAR-2045) answered within 15 working days; erasure executed for ex-intern Ms. Lan Ziran (ID: 41*************18) on 2026-04-22 under ticket ER-Δ-3F4A, with audit log retained 6 months.
Consent withdrawal: one customer withdrew consent for cross-border telemetry on 2026-05-03; exports for that profile halted and local-only processing enabled; retention shortened to 90 days for derived metrics tied to that profile.
Negative control statement: no minors’ personal information (<14) is processed in this transaction scope; any child-related templates in the DPA are policy-only and do not indicate live processing.
Employment workflows: HRIS “RenHe Gate v4.2” collects role, team, and contact only; bank info stored as alias tokens; onboarding forms include referee contacts and masked resident IDs (e.g., 37*************65); retention per HR-2026-07 is 3 years post-termination; minimisation checks completed monthly.
Data export approvals: Approval Memo LHCAD/CBT/2026/009 appended; note—control is policy-only for payroll, and payroll data is not exported outside mainland PRC.
IT note: device MAC addresses are not collected by default and “not a MAC capture workflow” applies; investor deck relies on public-source product materials and excludes MNPI.
Data localisation: DSL-compliant storage confirmed for mapping caches (geo_cache_cn) in Linghai Region Node A; network routes for analytics mirroring use anonymised IDs only.
Payment and milestones: Tranche A CNY 120,000,000 at closing; Tranche B CNY 60,000,000 upon customer acceptance of “project qingyao alpha”; option exercise window closes 24 months after Tranche A.
Representations: Issuer warrants PIPL-compliant notices presented to employees and customers; data subject rights channel active at privacy@qincheng-ne.example.cn and via portal https://datahub.qne-ex.example.cn/dsar?req=Δ-2045.
Access to schedules: DPA Schedule available at https://dealroom.haihua-ex.example.cn/dpa?v=4.1&org=QNE-9L3Q0ZB3T1K90012X&sid=TS-2026-Δ; Standard Contract and cross-border filings archived in folder “CBT-α7”.
Identifiers and obfuscation: project code YN-β-7712; staff code uSER_00l-O; hashed issuer ID 77c1::ab9f::440e; file tag TS/QNE/ZSH/2026/Σ; USCC refs: 9L3Q0ZB3T1K90012X and 5Y1Z0LQ3D7F88006M.
Clarification for precision: no ongoing cross-border transfers occur for employee resident IDs; any historical export was completed and purged per ER-Δ-204, and this sentence does not indicate a current privacy risk.
Contacts: Mr. Chen Huai, Chief Compliance Officer, +86-09-2888-7000 ext 931; chen.huai@qincheng-ne.example.cn; postal Tower 9, Jinghai New District, Linghai (fictional).
Legal: This term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, data handling, governing law (Linghai Province), and dispute resolution before the Yunhe Arbitration Commission (fictional); closing targeted within 60 days of CP satisfaction.
